conflicts.label: Iran 2026 (Day 62)
conflicts.note: Operation Epic Fury — Day 62. Three U.S. CSGs in CENTCOM (Lincoln/Ford/Bush) holds — first time since Operation Iraqi Freedom in 2003. Iran ceasefire INDEFINITE (Trump Apr 21) — holding day 22. ⚠️ Apr 30: Brent intraday HIGH $126.41/bbl (Asia trading) — highest since 2022, four-year wartime high — pared on Axios report that CENTCOM commander Adm. Brad Cooper would brief Trump on potential renewed strike options including 'a short and intense wave of strikes.' AAA national gas $4.30/gal (4-yr high since July 2022; +43.8% vs $2.99 baseline). Eurozone April CPI 3.0% (from 2.6%) attributed to Iran shock; ECB 2%, BoE 3.75%; UN ESCAP: ~8.8M Asia-Pacific persons at poverty risk. Trump (Axios Apr 29) explicitly REJECTED Iran's Hormuz-for-blockade-lift proposal. CENTCOM (Adm. Cooper Apr 29 HASC): blockade has redirected 42 commercial vessels cumulative (+8 since horizon). Pentagon Acting Comptroller Hurst Apr 29: ~$25B cumulative cost (mostly munitions; CNN sourcing characterizes as lowball excluding base-repair, force-flow, intel costs). Lebanon ceasefire (Apr 16) collapsing — Apr 30 Israeli strikes kill at least 9-14 in southern Lebanon (Lebanese NNA cites 14, CNN/Reuters 9); Lebanese MoPH cumulative ≥2,518 killed. Iran MoH 3,375 killed (Foundation of Martyrs separately 3,468). ~3.2M Iran IDPs + 1M+ Lebanese displaced. Cumulative U.S. cost midpoint ~$52.7B; range now $25B-$1T (Pentagon $25B floor → Harvard ~$1T ceiling). 60-day War Powers Resolution statutory deadline May 1 (T-1); H.Con.Res.38 (Massie/Khanna) at 94 cosponsors; latest Senate vote Apr 15 failed 52-47; Time scoop Apr 28: Democrats may sue Trump if he ignores deadline. Day 62 represents the longest U.S. combat operation under sole executive authority since 1973 War Powers Resolution to collide with the 60-day statutory cutoff during the conflict (vs. e.g., 2011 Libya, where the deadline came after the kinetic-phase ebb).

conflicts.label: Iraq 2003 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Iraqi Freedom — "shock and awe" + ground invasion. 300,000 troops deployed.

conflicts.label: Libya 2011 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Odyssey Dawn / Unified Protector — NATO no-fly zone. Limited US role.

conflicts.label: Gulf 1991 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Desert Storm — 38-day air campaign + 100-hour ground war. 700,000 coalition troops.

sources: CRS Reports R44116 (Iraq), RL33110 (Gulf War), R41725 (Libya). Costs inflation-adjusted to 2026 dollars using BLS CPI-U.
